response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most of their career focused on web stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and no demonstrable exposure to STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols like MQTT/OPC UA required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern web technologies and open-source contributions.
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops, code katas, and team initiatives.
Extensive background in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and DevOps tooling.
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL usage; core technical requirement not met.
No evidence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT/industrial protocols.
Experience is heavily skewed toward web/mobile, not on-premises/high-performance embedded systems.
